resources.string: Switchify enables you to use your device with adaptive switches. It scans your screen, allowing you to select a point to tap. You can also swipe, and do everything else you need to navigate your device. It also includes an item scan feature that allows you to navigate through items on your screen.
Switchify makes it easy to control your device with adaptive switches. It scans the screen, letting you tap, swipe, and navigate effortlessly.
Gesture lock ON - Select a gesture
Gesture lock re-armed - Select a gesture
Gesture Repeat waiting for next gesture
Turn off Gesture Repeat before using Gesture Lock
Turn off Gesture Repeat before using Re-arm Gesture Lock
Turn off Re-arm Gesture Lock before using Gesture Lock
Turn off Re-arm Gesture Lock before using Gesture Repeat
Turn off Gesture Lock before using Gesture Repeat
Turn off Gesture Lock before using Re-arm Gesture Lock
Stop Auto Scroll before using Gesture Lock
Stop Auto Scroll before using Re-arm Gesture Lock
Stop Auto Scroll before using Gesture Repeat
Turn off Gesture Repeat before using Auto Scroll
Turn off Re-arm Gesture Lock before using Auto Scroll
Turn off Gesture Lock before using Auto Scroll
Started recording new gesture pattern. Perform your gestures to add them to the pattern. When you\'re done, open the Gesture Patterns menu to save it.
Saved gesture pattern. You can give it a more descriptive name in the app settings.
Recording canceled. It will not be saved.
Switch technique and toggle head control
Turn gesture lock back on ready to choose another gesture
Repeat the selected gesture on a timer until a switch is pressed
Use single finger for all gestures. Provides maximum precision.
Use two fingers for all gestures. Provides enhanced stability.
Use three fingers for all gestures. Natural tripod grip for multi-touch interactions like pinch-to-zoom.
Use four fingers for all gestures. Natural four-finger swipe patterns for scrolling and navigation.
Use five fingers for all gestures. Whole-hand placement for complex multi-touch gestures and full-screen interactions.
Sequentially scanning the items on the screen
Moving a radar around the screen
Select an exact point using scanning lines
Use a single switch to scan and select
Use multiple switches to manually move and select
Use four switches to move up, down, left, and right
Camera access is required to detect facial gestures for switch control. This permission will only be used when the switch is active.
Camera permission has been denied. Please enable it in your device settings to use facial gesture switches.
Camera access is not granted. Please grant camera access in the app settings and then restart the Accessibility Service.
Switchify is paused. You can now use your switches with other apps. To resume, don\'t press any switches for %1$s.
Manual Pattern Started - Press switch to advance
1-hour service trial started. All features available!
30-second DEBUG trial started. All features available!
10 minutes remaining in service trial. Restart service for fresh trial.
Service trial expired. Restart accessibility service for fresh 1-hour trial.
Switchify Pro activated. Unlimited access to all features!
Debug mode: Trials disabled. Unlimited access!
Device locked. New trial start blocked for security.
Completely disable trial system for unlimited access (debug only)
All features are now available in trial mode.
Select the current item or start auto scan if it is being used
No favourite apps. Add some in Settings.
Choose apps for quick access from the menu
No favourite apps added yet. Tap + to add apps.
Turn Gesture Lock Re-arm on or off
Repeat the selected gesture on a timer until a switch is pressed
Pause Switchify temporarily to use switches with other apps
Pure black and white for low-vision users
Blue and yellow tones distinguishable to red-green colorblind users
Red and teal tones distinguishable to blue-yellow colorblind users
Find and connect to Switchify PC over Bluetooth.
Install Switchify PC on your computer before connecting over Bluetooth.
After connecting, open the Switchify menu and choose Control PC.
Allow Bluetooth so Switchify can find nearby PCs.
Open the Switchify menu and choose Control PC.
Keep Switchify PC open on your computer.
Open Switchify PC on your computer and keep Bluetooth enabled.
Check Bluetooth and try reopening this screen.
Switchify needs Bluetooth permission to find and connect to Switchify PC.
Open Switchify PC on your computer and keep Bluetooth enabled.
Switchify will forget %1$s. You will need to request access again before controlling this PC.
Repeat PC mouse movement and scrolling until the next switch press.
Time between repeated PC mouse actions.
Configure PC controls and connection settings.
Confirm this code matches the one shown on your PC before accepting.
Waiting for approval on your PC...
Connect to PC from Switchify first.
Waiting for approval on your PC...
Confirm code %1$s on your PC before accepting.
Could not send command to PC.
Could not send text to PC.
Could not send key to PC.
Move the PC pointer up and left.
Move the PC pointer up and right.
Move the PC pointer down and left.
Move the PC pointer down and right.
Manage your custom gesture patterns. You can edit their names, reorder them, or delete them.
No gesture patterns found. Create patterns in the Gesture Patterns menu of the accessibility service.
Are you sure you want to delete the pattern "%1$s"? This action cannot be undone.
Update downloaded and ready to install!
Update pending: Tap to install the latest version.
Speed of the scanning line movement
Adjust the speed at which scanning moves
This is how fast scanning moves when you are selecting a block. Once you select a block, the precision point scan speed will be used.
Move a scanning line to choose a point
Pick a grid block, then refine with a line
Scan items in rows and columns
Scan items in groups for faster selection
Speak the item content description while scanning
The number of times to scan before stopping
Item Scan Speed (only applies to auto scan)
The speed at which items are scanned
Configure the scan speeds for auto scan
Are you sure you want to delete this switch?
The scan highlight will be a border around the item
The scan highlight will be a solid color
Automatically start scanning after a selection
Pause briefly on the first item of each scan cycle
How long to pause on the first item
Hold down a switch to move repeatedly
The delay before repeating the last move action
Radar speed (only applies to auto scan)
Slow Down Then Select (only applies to auto scan)
Press once to slow down scanning, press again to select
Choose where the radar line starts from
Test facial expressions and configure camera settings
Configure head movement sensitivity and response
How long to hold a smile to trigger camera switch
How long to hold a left wink to trigger camera switch
How long to hold a right wink to trigger camera switch
How long to hold a blink to trigger camera switch
How long to hold a pucker to trigger camera switch
Manage your account and sign out
Sign in to sync your preferences
View your usage statistics and trends
Enable transparency for the menu so that you can see content behind it
Make service menu items easier to see. Larger sizes may use more screen space.
Automatically select the item after a delay. If you press the switch again during the delay, the menu will be opened.
The delay before the item is selected. If you press the switch again during the delay, the menu will be opened.
If enabled, the switch will directly select keyboard keys instead of giving the user the option to open the menu.
Assist the user in selecting items by selecting the closest available item to where they select.
Debug builds listen for %1$s while the accessibility service is running. Use it to perform Switchify actions and reload settings from ADB without relying on synthetic key events.

adb shell am broadcast -a %1$s -p com.enaboapps.switchify --es action next\nadb shell am broadcast -a %1$s -p com.enaboapps.switchify --es action home\nadb shell am broadcast -a %1$s -p com.enaboapps.switchify --es action reload_settings
Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action cannot be undone.
Would you like to clear your local preferences when signing out?
Would you like to clear your local preferences when deleting your account?
Thank you for trying out Switchify Pro! You can now access all of Switchify\'s features.
Press the switch that you want to use

Is your switch not working? If you are using a USB switch, please make sure that you have it plugged in and that it is turned on. If you are using a Bluetooth switch, please make sure that it is paired with your device.
Actions execute in sequence based on hold duration
No long press actions configured. Add an action to get started.
Save the switch first to configure long press actions.
Ignore repeated presses of the same switch
The delay before ignoring repeated presses of the same switch
The time to hold a switch before performing an action
How long before Switchify automatically resumes from pause
How long to hold a switch during pause to resume Switchify
When enabled, scrolling gestures will be repeatedly performed until a switch is pressed
The delay to wait between scrolling
Advance through gesture pattern steps by pressing a switch instead of automatic timing
When enabled, pressing any switch will stop the currently executing gesture pattern
After gesture lock turns off, turn it back on ready to choose another gesture
Repeat the selected gesture until a switch is pressed
The delay before the first repeated gesture
The delay to wait between repeated gestures
Configure point scan, radar, and item scan settings
Minimum head movement required before cursor moves
Let\'s get you set up in just a few steps
Set up Switchify for the first time
Sign in to restore my settings
This helps us personalize your experience
I\'m setting this up for others
Switchify offers two ways to navigate your device
You can change between Auto and Manual scan modes at any time in settings
Switches are how you\'ll control your device
Your current switch configuration doesn\'t match the selected scan mode requirements. Please configure the required switch actions.
This allows Switchify to help you control your device
Tap, swipe, and navigate anywhere on your screen
Understand what\'s on screen to help you navigate
Efficiently move through apps and content
Switchify only observes screen content to help you navigate. We never collect or store personal information.
You\'re all set to start using Switchify!
Almost there! One more to go!
To practice with your switches, please enable the Accessibility Service first.
Try activating each box using your switches
Get the most out of Switchify with Pro
Please describe your feedback in detail...
Your feedback has been submitted successfully. We appreciate your input!
Report issues or problems you\'re experiencing
No app available to open this link
Share your thoughts and help us improve
Grant camera access for head control features
Tap to enable in system settings
Configure head movement sensitivity and cursor control for smooth head control experience
Choose which gesture performs the select action
Choose which gesture opens the main menu
How long to hold the gesture to open the menu in head control mode
Selection and menu gestures cannot be the same. Menu gesture will be automatically changed.
Invalid selection gesture detected. Please choose a valid gesture.
Invalid menu gesture detected. Please choose a valid gesture.
Menu gesture automatically updated to avoid conflict
How long to hold the gesture to trigger selection in head control mode
Turn your head to the left
Turn your head to the right
How long to hold a direction before it starts stepping
Time between steps while a direction is held
Use different thresholds for each direction
When enabled, Head Control selection takes priority over switch actions for the same gesture
Selected gesture is also assigned as a camera switch. Depending on priority, one of them will be ignored.
Head control requires camera permission to function
Head control requires device to be unlocked to function
Head control enabled after device unlock
Head control enabled after camera permission granted
Head control disabled due to camera permission revocation
Move your head left, right, up, and down to control the ball. Your current movement and sensitivity settings will be used.
Control your device using head movements detected by your camera
Move cursor by tilting or turning your head
Select items using facial gestures (smile, wink, blink)
Requires camera permission and good lighting
Customize menu item order and visibility

Items appear in this order in the service menu. When more items are added than fit on a page, the rest move to the next page — the page markers show where each new page starts. Tap the eye icon to hide or show items.
Tap a row to insert %1$s above it, or use \"Insert at the end\".
Unable to load stats. Please try again.
Are you sure you want to clear all statistics? This cannot be undone.

With your permission, Switchify can send usage events and crash reports to help us spot problems and improve the app. If you\'re signed in, these reports are linked to your account email. You can change this at any time in Settings.
Switchify never sends the content of your screen.
Send usage events and crash reports to help improve Switchify.

When enabled, Switchify sends usage events (which features you use) and crash reports to our team so we can fix bugs and improve the app. If you\'re signed in, these reports are linked to your account email. Switchify never sends the content of your screen. You can turn this off at any time.
Go back to the previous screen
Single tap at the cursor location
Tap twice quickly at the cursor location
Choose how long to hold a tap
Hold the tap for half a second
Hold the tap for one second
Hold the tap for two seconds
Hold the tap for three seconds
Hold the tap for five seconds
Hold the tap for ten seconds
Start a drag gesture from the cursor
Choose how many fingers to use for gestures
Repeat the next gesture without reopening the menu
Swipe up from the cursor location
Swipe down from the cursor location
Swipe left from the cursor location
Swipe right from the cursor location
Move two fingers together to zoom out
Move two fingers apart to zoom in
Open one of your favourite apps
Add favourites in the app settings
Run a saved sequence of gestures
Play back this saved gesture pattern
Begin recording a new gesture pattern
Capture a screenshot of the screen
Raise the system volume one step
Lower the system volume one step
Set the system volume to maximum
Set the system volume to halfway
Skip back to the previous track
Skip forward to the next track
Open editing actions for this field
Cut the selected text to the clipboard
Copy the selected text to the clipboard
Paste from the clipboard at the cursor
Turn head control on or off
Pause Switchify until you tap to resume
Pick a new endpoint for this gesture
Close this menu without picking anything
Go back to the previous menu
Show the previous page of menu items
Show the next page of menu items
Draft replies and pull out highlights from the screen
Capture the screen and suggest replies
Capturing the screen for Reply Drafter...
Download the AI model first in Settings
Reply Drafter needs Android 11 or newer
Tap a reply to copy it to the clipboard
Guide the replies (optional) — e.g. \"be more formal\"
Capture the screen and pull out things you can copy
Download the AI model first in Settings
Screen Highlights needs Android 11 or newer
No highlights found on this screen
Tap a highlight to copy it to the clipboard
On-device AI needs Android 11 or newer
Manage the on-device model that powers Switchify\'s AI features
Switchify\'s AI features run on a model that works entirely on your device, with nothing sent to the cloud. It is a one-time download of roughly 3 GB.
Switchify\'s AI features run on a model that works entirely on your device, with nothing sent to the cloud. Your device has this model built in, so there is no large download.
Delete the downloaded model? You can download it again later.
The model is downloaded and ready to use.
Not enough free storage to download the model.
Download failed. Check your connection and try again.
On-device AI is a Pro feature.
Keep this screen open until the download finishes. It pauses if you leave.
Your device has built-in AI. No download needed.
Your device supports built-in AI. Set it up to power Switchify\'s AI features with no large download.
Switchify\'s AI features use Google\'s Gemma model, which runs entirely on your device. To download it you must agree to Google\'s Gemma Terms of Use and Prohibited Use Policy.
I agree to the Gemma terms
